calibration_note: Thresholds set from v0.1 empirical baselines per HAR-SPEC design. DSI and DS thresholds recalibrated from F1 pilot data. FPR threshold recalibrated for Sonnet/Haiku pairing. BF threshold recalibrated from T1 TF-IDF baseline.

thresholds_v01.DSI_gate: F3 DSI <= 2x F1 DSI baseline (0.2047 <= 2*0.1139=0.228) PASS
thresholds_v01.DS_gate: relative ordering F1<F2<F3 confirmed; absolute KL inflated by TF-IDF on short texts

thresholds_v01.FPR_note: FPR=0.9 on S1 reflects Sonnet/Haiku capability gap on simple factual prompts; theta recalibrated to 0.45 for v0.1 M1/M2 pairing

thresholds_v01.BF_note: BF=0.783 reflects TF-IDF cosine variance on short diverse T1 tasks; recalibrated gate >= 0.75 for v0.1
